历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category has been approximately 25729 → 29282 → 33456 → 34252 → 37123, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11394 positions over the past 5 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 37123 positions; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 222 in 2021, 215 in 2022, 212 in 2023, 193 in 2024, and 192 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction; the 2026 plan is 211, an increase of 19 from 2025 (expansion of about 9.9%), which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 45th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 42–47 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; no significant negative public opinion incidents have been detected in reputation monitoring; Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 564,000, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, no abnormal admission or gap records, and stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, with a total of 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, featuring distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of hot majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication remains relatively high, but the university is an agricultural and forestry institution, with core advantageous disciplines (Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Agronomy, etc.) having average social popularity; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from about 606,800 in 2025, with an estimated 365,000 Physics Category candidates, slightly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an upward trend year by year, reflecting increased overall competition intensity. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province accounts for about 3–4% of the university's total national plan, a moderately low level, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 Physics Category expansion of about 9.9% (alleviating competition), the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province and the rise in the provincial control line (intensifying competition), the expansion effect is slightly greater than the candidate increase effect, but the inertia of ranking backward shift is strong; taking into account the increased competition due to the rise in candidate numbers and provincial control line, the predicted minimum ranking is about 39377, with a range of 38877–39877.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3035 → 3426 → 4468 → 4175 → 4745, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, there was a slight recovery (4175), but in 2025 it moved back again to 4745, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1710 positions over the past 5 years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 34 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 40 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 38, a decrease of 2 from 2025 (a 5% reduction), which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 45th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. No significant negative public opinion was detected in the school's reputation monitoring; Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively hot), with no abnormal filing records, and stable application psychology. It has A+ in Veterinary Medicine, A+ in Animal Husbandry, A in Crop Science, A in Aquaculture, and A in Food Science and Engineering, totaling 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially, liberal arts majors such as Law and Economics are relatively hot, but the History Category enrollment majors at this university are mainly in economics, management, literature, and law, not core agricultural and forestry advantageous disciplines. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, with an estimated 245,000 History Category candidates, a slight increase from 2025 (243,700). The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, showing an upward trend. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with a relatively small enrollment in Hebei Province (about 34–40 people), at a medium-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 5% reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026 (intensifying competition), a slight increase in the total number of candidates, and the rise in the provincial control line, the combined effect of enrollment reduction and increased candidates pushes the ranking forward (harder to enter). Taking into account the enrollment reduction and candidate increase, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4573, with a range of 4073–5073.
